name: Commander
description: Commanders operate on a grand scale, controlling fleets and armies across worlds and interstellar space. They may not be the deadliest soldiers, but they bring out the best in their forces.
caveat: Commander Traits do not function of the commander is Jammed

name: Reinforced
effect: The Commander gains +1 Structure and +1 Stress.

actions.name: Voice Of Authority
actions.trigger: An allied character fails an attack, check or save, and you aren't Jammed.

name: Bolster Network
effect: As long as the Commander isn't Jammed, all allied characters within line of sight (excluding the Commander) gain +1 Accuracy on Systems saves, and tech attacks made against them receive +1 Difficulty.

active_effects.name: Bolster Network
active_effects.detail: As long as you aren't Jammed, all allied characters within line of sight (excluding you) gain +1 Accuracy on Systems saves, and tech attacks made against them receive +1 Difficulty.

actions.name: Press The Attack
actions.trigger: A target damages an allied character and you aren't Jammed.
actions.detail: You can attack the target, and deal half damage, heat or Burn if successful.

actions.name: Press On!
actions.detail: Clear either the Stunned condition or the Jammed condition currently affecting an allied character within line of sight. This cannot be used if you are Jammed.

actions.name: Quick March
actions.detail: If you aren't Jammed, one allied character within line of sight may Boost.

name: Military Discipline
effect: As long as the Commander isn't Jammed, allied characters adjacent to the Commander gain +1 Accuracy on all attacks, saves and checks.

active_effects.name: Military Discipline
active_effects.detail: As long as the you aren't Jammed, you gain +1 Accuracy on all attacks, saves and checks while adjacent to the Commander.
